pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 18, 34, 68; export_result.sh lines 21, 42. Path is consistently used throughout task setup and verification scripts. This follows standard Nuxeo path structure /default-domain/workspaces/{workspace-name}.
setup_task.sh line 46: Note is created with 'dc:title': 'Q3 Status Report'. This property is the document title in Nuxeo metadata.

export_result.sh line 21: NXQL query explicitly searches for documents with dc:title = 'Q3 Status Report - Archived'. Task description (task.json line 4) confirms agent should create document with this title. verifier.py line 26 validates against this value.

pi_items.metadata_value: Static archive of the Q3 report
pi_items.verified_value: Static archive of the Q3 report
pi_items.source: task.json task description (lines 4-5) explicitly states: 'Set the new document's title to 'Q3 Status Report - Archived' and the description to 'Static archive of the Q3 report'.' verifier.py line 27 loads this from metadata and line 93 validates it against actual document.

Standard MIME type for PDF files per RFC 4289. Task requires exporting note as PDF file. verifier.py line 77 validates that mime_type == 'application/pdf' when checking archived document's file content.

privileged_info_summary:
The task creates a test Note document titled 'Q3 Status Report' in the /default-domain/workspaces/Projects workspace (containing HTML content: '

Q3 Status Report

Date: October 15, 2023

...'). The agent must export this note as a PDF and upload it back as a new File document with title 'Q3 Status Report - Archived', description 'Static archive of the Q3 report', and MIME type application/pdf. All metadata claims about target paths, titles, descriptions, and file types are verified against the setup and verification scripts.
